title: AgentCapability Verifiable Credential
description: A generic Verifiable Credential attesting that the subject AI agent is authorised to exercise a named capability. Not specific to any vendor or platform.

@context.description: JSON-LD context array. Must include the base W3C VC context.

type.description: Credential type array. Must include 'VerifiableCredential' and 'AgentCapability'.

id.description: Unique identifier for this credential instance (URI).

issuanceDate.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the credential was issued.

id.description: DID of the AI agent being granted the capability.

capability.description: Capability name in dot-namespaced notation. Examples: file.read, api.call, database.query.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this capability grants.

resourceScope.description: Optional list of resource URIs this capability applies to. Absent means the capability is resource-agnostic.

proof.description: Cryptographic proof. When the credential is JWT-encoded, this field is absent.
